[1] presents a comprehensive benchmark paper written in Quarto. [2] is a tutorial paper on technical writing with Quarto.

References

[1]
B. Brajon, E. Gasparin, and G. Close, “A benchmark of integrated magnetometers and magnetic gradiometers,” IEEE Access, vol. 11, pp. 115635–115643, 2023, doi: 10.1109/ACCESS.2023.3325035.
